task_completion.description: Verify basic information and T4 entry for Chloe Tremblay.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the StudioTax 'Personal Information' screen showing the name 'Chloe Tremblay' and Province of Residence as 'NB' (New Brunswick). Also look for the T4 slip entry screen showing Box 14 (Employment Income) as 68450, Box 22 (Income Tax Deducted) as 10250, and Box 10 (Province of Employment) as 'ON'.

task_completion.description: Verify T2125 Gross Sales and Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) entries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the T2125 form (Statement of Business or Professional Activities). Verify Gross Sales is entered as 45750. In the Cost of Goods Sold section, verify Opening Inventory is 5240, Purchases is 12860, and Closing Inventory is 4110.
Look for the Expenses section of the T2125 form. Verify the following entries: Freight/Delivery = 4820, Management/Admin fees = 2150, and Advertising = 3550.

task_completion.description: Verify T2125 Business-Use-of-Home expenses and proration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Business-use-of-home expenses' section of the T2125 form. Verify Rent is entered as 18000 and Utilities as 1200. Verify the area proration shows 150 for the business area and 1000 for the total area.
Look for the Medical Expenses worksheet or entry screen in StudioTax. Verify an entry of 4600 (description should relate to laser eye surgery).

task_completion.description: Verify the tax return is saved with the correct filename in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the StudioTax application title bar showing 'chloe_tremblay.24t' or a File Explorer window showing the file 'chloe_tremblay.24t' saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual StudioTax 2024 application window being interacted with, not a text editor or terminal window.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the UI by writing directly to the .24t file via scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing python scripts, echo commands, or text editors modifying the 'chloe_tremblay.24t' file directly.

integrity.description: Ensure data was entered into the correct form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Values should be visible inside the specific input boxes for T4, T2125, and Medical Expenses within the StudioTax interface, rather than pasted as a single block of text somewhere else.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer: Chloe Tremblay. Province of Residence: NB. T4: Box 14 = 68450, Box 22 = 10250, Box 10 = ON. T2125: Gross Sales = 45750, Opening Inventory = 5240, Purchases = 12860, Closing Inventory = 4110. T2125 Expenses: Freight = 4820, Management = 2150, Advertising = 3550. T2125 Home Use: Rent = 18000, Utilities = 1200, Area = 150 sq ft out of 1000 sq ft. Medical: 4600. Output File: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\chloe_tremblay.24t.
